mapper.select: SELECT MANAGE.BNDT_ID AS bndtId , MANAGE.BNDT_DE AS bndtDe , MANAGE.RM AS remark , (SELECT M.USER_NM FROM VW_USER_MASTER M WHERE M.ESNTL_ID = MANAGE.FRST_REGISTER_ID) AS bndtTemp1 , (SELECT COUNT(DIARY.BNDT_ID) FROM TB_BNDT_DIARY DIARY WHERE DIARY.BNDT_ID = MANAGE.BNDT_ID AND DIARY.BNDT_DE = MANAGE.BNDT_DE) AS bndtTemp2 FROM TB_BNDT_MANAGE MANAGE WHERE 1=1 AND SUBSTRING(MANAGE.BNDT_DE, 1, 6) LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{bndtDe}),'%') ORDER BY MANAGE.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_BNDT_MANAGE MANAGE WHERE 1=1 AND SUBSTRING(MANAGE.BNDT_DE, 1, 6) LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{bndtDe}),'%')
SELECT BNDT_ID AS bndtId , BNDT_DE AS bndtDe , RM AS remark , FRST_REGISTER_ID AS frstRegisterId FROM TB_BNDT_MANAGE WHERE BNDT_ID = #{bndtId} AND BNDT_DE = #{bndtDe}
SELECT BNDT_ID AS bndtId , BNDT_DE AS bndtDe , RM AS remark FROM TB_BNDT_MANAGE WHERE BNDT_DE = #{bndtDe}
